judicialId.description: The reference data identify for the judicial role.

judicialRoleType.description: The classification of the judicial role

isDeputy.description: Indicates if the judiciary acts as a deputy.  This is applicable to circuit and district judges

isBenchChairman.description: Indicates if the magistrate acts as a bench chairman.  This is only applicable to magistrate roles

userId.description: The reference data identify for the user id.
